title: SparklineWidgetConfig
description: Config for sandbox.sparkline — a compact inline line chart driven by a comma-separated numeric series.

x-atlas-presets.label: Default sparkline
x-atlas-presets.description: Themed accent color, no end-point marker.

x-atlas-presets.label: With end-point marker
x-atlas-presets.description: Highlight the most recent value with a dot.

values.title: Values
values.description: Comma-separated numeric series. Whitespace around commas is tolerated.

color.title: Line color
color.description: CSS color value for the line. Blank uses the design-system default (--atlas-chart-color-1).

showLastPoint.title: Mark last point
showLastPoint.description: Draw a circular marker at the most recent point so the series end stands out.

label.title: Accessible label
label.description: Screen-reader label describing what the sparkline represents (e.g. "Signups (last 11 days)").
